description_long: This sculpture depicts a monstrous, otherworldly figure seated on a rectangular plinth. The creature has an elongated, insectoid head with prominent mandibles and two long, upward-curving horns or antennae. Its limbs are thin and jointed, with exaggeratedly long fingers and toes, and it sits in a hunched, almost ritualistic pose, clutching an object in its hands. The base of the sculpture is inscribed with mysterious, runic symbols, adding to its enigmatic and ancient appearance. The surface is dark, mottled, and appears to be made of aged bronze or a similar metal, giving it a weathered, ominous presence.
description: A dark, monstrous figure with elongated limbs and horns sits on a runic-inscribed plinth, exuding an ancient, mysterious aura.
description_view_0: Front view shows the creature's face, horns, and hands clutching an object, with runic symbols visible on the plinth.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the creature's bent limbs, side profile of the head, and the depth of the plinth.
description_view_2: Rear view reveals the back of the head, the arrangement of the limbs, and additional runic inscriptions on the plinth.
description_view_3: Right side view displays the creature's arm and hand positions, as well as the side details of the plinth and inscriptions.
attribute_subject_matter: monstrous humanoid figure with runic inscriptions
attribute_location_context: No specific environmental context is visible; the sculpture appears isolated against a plain background.
